ingredients.name: Sunshine Street
ingredients.localName: サンシャイン通り

ingredients.entityContext: Sunshine Street is the iconic corridor that Mikado walks down on his very first night in Ikebukuro in episode 1, wide-eyed at the city's energy. It is faithfully recreated in the opening credits and is the single most recognized pilgrimage spot for Durarara!! fans.

ingredients.name: HOTEL VARKIN

ingredients.address: 1 Chome-1-14 Ikebukuro, Toshima City, Tokyo 170-0014, Japan

ingredients.address: 1 Chome-10-1 Higashiikebukuro, Toshima City, Tokyo 170-0013, Japan

ingredients.name: Tsubame-Gaeshi

ingredients.description: Tsubame-Gaeshi (燕返し) — local spot in Tokyo, near Points Check Machines and Mejiro Garden. Not listed on Google Maps, but the coordinates fall in this area — a verified scene location. Navigate by coordinates / Street View.
ingredients.entityContext: This offgrid location near East Ikebukuro appears in episode 13, a street-level spot used during the escalating Saika arc when the city's back alleys become battlegrounds for the possessed crowd.
